content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the dashed center line bending rightward, and the car appears well-positioned near center.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 56, target index = (56+5) % 121 = 61
- Target WP61: x=3.8774, y=3.6345
- Car: x=4.5302, y=3.0491, heading=140.10°
- dy = 3.6345 - 3.0491 = 0.5854, dx = 3.8774 - 4.5302 = -0.6528
- bearing = atan2(0.5854, -0.6528) → second quadrant: atan(0.5854/0.6528) = 41.9°, bearing = 180° - 41.9° = **138.1°**
- delta = 138.1 - 140.10 = **-2.0°** → nearly straight, tiny right

**Boundary check:**
- track_width/2 = 0.3800m, distance_from_center = 0.1065m
- is_left_of_center = false (right of center), edge_distance = 0.3800 - 0.1065 = 0.2735m → clear
- No boundary override

Delta ~-2.0° → |delta| < 5°, use steering_angle=0, speed=1.5.

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track curves gently right ahead, delta=-2.0° to WP61 is nearly zero; car is on course with 0.27m right edge clearance, so steering straight at full speed.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track starts with long straight along y≈0.683 before curving left around x=6.3-7.3.",
    "Left curve spans WP27-44 requiring sustained positive steering ~15°.",
    "After left curve, track straightens westward along y≈2.77 (WP44-55).",
    "WP55-70 region: track bends south/southwest, delta near -2° to -10° — use 0° to -5° steering at 1.5.",
    "Car consistently near center (~0.07-0.11m right of center) — no boundary concern.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves; reduce to 1.0 only when delta >30°.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "Use minimal steering on near-straight sections to avoid oscillation.",
    "Southward bend WP55-70 is gentle; delta stays small (-2° to -6°), minimal correction needed.",
    "Delta decreasing each step confirms car is tracking the curve correctly — reduce steering as delta reduces."
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [4.8191, 4.7340, 4.6601, 4.5877, 4.5302],
    "y": [2.7795, 2.8395, 2.9020, 2.9759, 3.0491],
    "heading": [162.322, 156.260, 151.118, 144.916, 140.097]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": "Target WP61 at (3.877, 3.635): bearing=138.1°, delta=-2.0° → nearly on line, no correction needed.",
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
